post.description:
Admin: Invite an agent.
Creates an AgentInvite record and sends an invite email.
Admin: directly create an agent (no invite flow) with a temporary password.

get.description: Admin: List agents with pagination and filtering.

Admin: consolidated summary for all non-deleted agents (profile status, assignments, latest invite).

``profileStatus`` is the raw ``agent_profiles.status`` string. Each assignment includes stored
``isActive`` / ``revokedAt`` plus ``assignmentStatus`` (same labels as GET /agents/assignments).
Top-level counts use stored profile status: ``pendingInvites`` (``INVITED``), ``pendingReview``
(``PENDING_REVIEW``), ``declined`` (``DECLINED``), ``activeAgents`` (``ACTIVE``). ``lastFiveAgents``
are up to five agents with the newest ``users.created_at`` (full detail per agent). There is no
full ``agents`` list on this endpoint.

**Sample request:** ``GET /api/v1/agents/summary`` with ``Authorization: Bearer <token>`` (admin).

**Sample success JSON:**

.. code-block:: json

    {
      "success": true,
      "data": {
        "totalAgents": 1,
        "activeAgents": 1,
        "pendingInvites": 0,
        "pendingReview": 0,
        "declined": 0,
        "lastFiveAgents": []
      },
      "message": null
    }

Admin: **top 3 agents** over the **last 30 days UTC**.

**Window:** ``lastDate`` = current time (UTC); ``firstDate`` = 30 days before ``lastDate`` (inclusive range for metrics).

**Ranking:** (1) **closed deals** — primary; (2) **inquiry response rate** — secondary.

**Metrics**

- ``closedDeals``: listings with ``deal_closed`` whose ``updated_at`` falls in the window (inclusive).
- ``responseRate``: among inquiries with ``leads.created_at`` in the window, percentage where
  ``updated_at > created_at``.
- ``area``: ``agent_profiles.service_area`` (nullable).

**Example:** ``GET /api/v1/agents/leaderboard``

**Example ``data.agents`` item:**

.. code-block:: json

    {
      "name": "Omar Shdeifat",
      "closedDeals": 19,
      "responseRate": "94%",
      "area": "Dabouq"
    }

post.description:
Persist a draft: primary path is ``payload`` (Save as Draft with full stepper state from local/Redux).

Empty or omitted body remains supported for backward compatibility (older clients that created a row on entry).
Create a submission, validate, and submit in one atomic flow (e.g. Redux-first with no prior ``submission_id``).

get.description: Get one submission by id for current owner user.

patch.description: Save progress: per-step (``step`` + ``data``) or full form (``payload`` + ``action=save_draft`` + ``current_step``).

delete.description:
Abandon a draft, delete after rejection, or clear *changes requested*; not allowed when pending or approved.

**Edit** remains ``PATCH /{submission_id}``; use this to remove a submission the agent is allowed to drop.

post.description:
Final submit: validate and persist into normalized property tables.

After admin **reject**, the agent can edit and call this again to re-enter **submitted** (pending review).

get.description:
List submissions for moderation with optional status filter.

Excludes agent-only rows (**draft**, **in_progress**); only the moderation queue
(**submitted**, **changes_requested**, **approved**, **rejected**) appears.

get.description:
Return properties where ``created_by`` is the current user, plus submission workflow metadata.

Each **item** may include ``submission_id`` / ``submission_status`` when the row is linked to
``property_listing_submissions`` (use for badges like *Pending admin approval* vs catalog
``status_slug`` from ``property_status``). **draft_submissions** lists in-progress wizards
with no ``property_id`` yet (matches extra rows you see only in that SQL table).

BoundsFilter.title: BoundsFilter
BoundsFilter.description:
Schema for bounding box filter in property search.

Defines a rectangular geographic area using minimum and maximum
latitude and longitude coordinates.

Attributes:
    min_lng: Minimum longitude (western boundary)
    min_lat: Minimum latitude (southern boundary)
    max_lng: Maximum longitude (eastern boundary)
    max_lat: Maximum latitude (northern boundary)

CreatePropertySubmissionRequest.title: CreatePropertySubmissionRequest
CreatePropertySubmissionRequest.description:
Create or replace a **server draft**.

**Recommended (new app flow):** send ``payload`` with the full stepper state when the user saves a draft
(Redux-first: no server round-trip on “Add property” alone).

**Backward compatible:** omit the body or omit ``payload`` to create an **empty** draft row (legacy clients);
the new UI does not need to call this empty variant on entry.

PropertyDetail.title: PropertyDetail
PropertyDetail.description:
Schema for detailed property information.

Used for property detail endpoints to provide comprehensive
property information including all available fields.

Attributes:
    id: Unique property identifier
    url: Original property URL from source
    title: Property title/name
    description: Property description
    category: Property category (e.g., 'Apartment', 'Villa')
    status: Property status (e.g., 'For Sale', 'For Rent')
    selling_price_amount: Selling price amount
    selling_price_currency: Currency for selling price
    rent_price_amount: Rent price amount
    rent_price_currency: Currency for rent price
    bedrooms: Number of bedrooms
    bathrooms: Number of bathrooms
    built_up_area: Built-up area in square meters
    features: Structured { amenities, finishing, windows, ... } per guide (from CSV features + more_features)
    images: List of image URLs
    latitude: Latitude coordinate
    longitude: Longitude coordinate
    location_name: Name of the location/area

PropertyDetailsStructured.title: PropertyDetailsStructured
PropertyDetailsStructured.description:
Details block for detail response (guide format).
built_up_area, land_area, bedrooms, bathrooms from DB; maid/driver/store_rooms derived from features.
terrace_area, garden_area, master_bedrooms, kitchens from DB or from meta features (Feature.value).

PropertyFeaturesStructured.title: PropertyFeaturesStructured
PropertyFeaturesStructured.description:
Structured features object for detail response. Only keys with a value are
included in JSON (null and empty list are omitted).

PropertyGeneralStructured.title: PropertyGeneralStructured
PropertyGeneralStructured.description:
General info block for detail response (guide format).
All fields from CSV/DB where available; null otherwise.

PropertyListResponse.title: PropertyListResponse
PropertyListResponse.description:
Schema for property list API response.

Standard response format for property listing endpoints,
containing the list of properties and total count.

Attributes:
    items: List of property search results
    total: Total number of properties in the result set

PropertyLocationDetail.title: PropertyLocationDetail
PropertyLocationDetail.description: Nested location for API: country, city, region, address, coordinates, map link.

PropertyPerformanceItem.title: PropertyPerformanceItem
PropertyPerformanceItem.description: Row for the property performance chart (view counts, trailing window on server).

PropertyPerformancePeriod.title: PropertyPerformancePeriod
PropertyPerformancePeriod.description: Time window for aggregating property_views; exposed as query param ``limit`` on the API.

PropertyPricingStructured.title: PropertyPricingStructured
PropertyPricingStructured.description:
Pricing block per guide: listing_type, rents, selling_price, currency, commission, etc.
Built from CSV/DB: selling_price, rent_price (and optional rent_commission, payment_method).
Keys with null/empty are omitted in the response.

PropertySearchRequest.title: PropertySearchRequest
PropertySearchRequest.description:
Schema for property search request.

Supports two search modes:
- bounds: Search within a rectangular bounding box
- polygon: Search within a custom polygon shape (GeoJSON)

Attributes:
    mode: Search mode ('bounds' or 'polygon')
    bounds: Bounding box filter (required when mode is 'bounds')
    polygon: Polygon filter (required when mode is 'polygon')
    limit: Maximum number of results to return

PropertySearchResponse.title: PropertySearchResponse
PropertySearchResponse.description:
Search API response matching the exact frontend contract.

Attributes:
    data: List of property search results
    total: Total number of properties matching filters
    page: Current page number (1-based)
    pageSize: Number of items per page

PropertySearchResult.title: PropertySearchResult
PropertySearchResult.description:
Schema for property search results.

Used in property listings and search results to provide essential
property information for display in search results.

Attributes:
    id: Unique property identifier
    title: Property title/name
    price: Property price (selling or rent price)
    price_currency: Currency code for the price (e.g., 'JOD', 'USD')
    bedrooms: Number of bedrooms
    bathrooms: Number of bathrooms
    thumbnail: URL to the first/thumbnail image
    lat: Latitude coordinate
    lng: Longitude coordinate

PropertySearchResultExtended.title: PropertySearchResultExtended
PropertySearchResultExtended.description:
Extended schema for property search results matching frontend format.
title and description use multi-language format: { "en": "...", "ar": "...", "esp": "...", "fr": "..." }.

payload.title: Payload
payload.description: When the client sent a full ``payload`` on create, the stored merged payload; otherwise null for empty create.

property_id.title: Property Id
property_id.description: Normalized property id if one was removed; null when the draft had no property row yet.

deleted_at.title: Deleted At
deleted_at.description: ISO timestamp when soft delete occurred.

current_step.title: Current Step
current_step.description: Set when sending full ``payload``; active wizard step after save (default 1).

PropertySubmissionPatchRequest.title: PropertySubmissionPatchRequest
PropertySubmissionPatchRequest.description: Patch a single step (``step`` + ``data``) or replace the whole draft (``payload`` + ``action=save_draft``).

payload.title: Payload
payload.description: Merged submission payload after save (same keys as GET). Use to sync client state without a second GET.

RecentViewItem.title: RecentViewItem
RecentViewItem.description: Recently viewed row payload aligned with favorites response style.

RecentViewUpsertRequest.title: RecentViewUpsertRequest
RecentViewUpsertRequest.description: Request body for adding/updating a recent property view.

RecentViewsListResponse.title: RecentViewsListResponse
RecentViewsListResponse.description: Container response for recent views list.

RefreshRequest.title: RefreshRequest
RefreshRequest.description: Refresh token request (refresh_token; optional username for SECRET_HASH).

RoleAssignmentRequest.title: RoleAssignmentRequest
RoleAssignmentRequest.description: Request body for assigning a role to a user.

RoleResponse.title: RoleResponse
RoleResponse.description: Role with id, permissions, created_at (from DB).

previous_password.title: Previous Password
previous_password.description: Required only if user already has a password

SetPasswordRequest.title: SetPasswordRequest
SetPasswordRequest.description: Request schema for setting initial password (for agents without password).

requires_password_set.title: Requires Password Set
requires_password_set.description: True if user must set a password (e.g. agent who signed in via OTP and has not set one)

TopAgentLeaderboardItem.title: TopAgentLeaderboardItem
TopAgentLeaderboardItem.description: One agent on the leaderboard: rank by closed deals first, inquiry response rate second.

TopAgentsLeaderboardResponse.title: TopAgentsLeaderboardResponse
TopAgentsLeaderboardResponse.description: Leaderboard window: ``firstDate`` = 30 days before ``lastDate``; ``lastDate`` = request time (UTC).

UserCreate.title: UserCreate
UserCreate.description: Request body for user registration (email, full_name, phone, password).

requires_password_set.title: Requires Password Set
requires_password_set.description: True if user must set a password (e.g. agent who signed in via OTP and has not set one)

UserResponse-Input.title: UserResponse
UserResponse-Input.description: User profile response with roles and verification flags.

requires_password_set.title: Requires Password Set
requires_password_set.description: True if user must set a password (e.g. agent who signed in via OTP and has not set one)

UserResponse-Output.title: UserResponse
UserResponse-Output.description: User profile response with roles and verification flags.

UserTypeQuery.title: UserTypeQuery
UserTypeQuery.description: GET /users ``userType`` query; ``register_user`` maps to DB role ``registered_user``.

UserUpdate.title: UserUpdate
UserUpdate.description: Partial update for user. All fields optional.

UsersListPaginatedResponse-Input.title: UsersListPaginatedResponse
UsersListPaginatedResponse-Input.description: Admin user list with pagination (totals aligned with property search: total, page, pageSize).

UsersListPaginatedResponse-Output.title: UsersListPaginatedResponse
UsersListPaginatedResponse-Output.description: Admin user list with pagination (totals aligned with property search: total, page, pageSize).
